Juno (2007)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $143,495,265Details
International Box Office $87,954,837
Worldwide Box Office $231,450,102
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $59,555,459
Total $59,555,459
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$413,869 (0.3% of total gross)
Legs:9.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 33.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/2,534 max. theaters, 10.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $241,311,335

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 5th, 2007 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: January 17th, 2008 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 15th, 2008 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material, sexual content and language
Running Time: 96 minutes
Award nomination: 2008 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Coming of Age, Teenage Mom, Unexpected Families, Unexpected Pregnancy
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Mandate Pictures, Mr. Mudd
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$413,869 (0.3% of total gross)
Legs:9.05 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$7,000,000 (worldwide box office is 33.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/2,534 max. theaters, 10.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $241,311,335

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 5th, 2007 (Limited) by Fox Searchlight
International Releases: January 17th, 2008 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 15th, 2008 by Fox Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for mature thematic material, sexual content and language
Running Time: 96 minutes
Award nomination: 2008 Oscars Best Picture Nominee
Award win: Writers Guild of America Best Original Screenplay Winner
Plot point: Coming of Age, Teenage Mom, Unexpected Families, Unexpected Pregnancy
Subgenre: Comedy Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Mandate Pictures, Mr. Mudd
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
